title: dioscoreaceae
intro: The dioscoreaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. Dioscoreaceae is the rank that groups together plants such as yams and their relatives, characterized by having underground stems and heart-shaped leaves. This family is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world and includes around 900 species. The name "dioscoreaceae" comes from the Greek word "dioscorea," meaning "yam," and is derived from Dioscorea, a genus within the family.
